summary: BA spec is accurate, complete, and verbatim-faithful: all 12 spot-checked file:line citations match actual source (app/page.tsx:14, app/page.tsx:11-22, components/EmployeeCard.tsx:38, components/DraftActions.tsx:30-36, lib/use-chat-page-actions.ts:17-20, lib/prompts.ts:3/6/87-96/98, lib/employees.ts:11/21/31/41, app/layout.tsx:8, components/ChatPageBody.tsx:92-96, lib/types.ts:17-22); independent full-repo grep for 'FeedbackForge' (excluding node_modules/.git/docs/.claude) confirms exactly 4 in-app source hits matching BA's claim; all 7 CHANGES from spec Section 5 (lines 116-195) are covered by 14 R-IDs with verbatim source-phrase quotes; CHANGE 5's session.messages access path is correctly localized to ChatPageBody.tsx:92-96 with the necessary 2-file edit (hook signature + call site).

(matches spec line 156-157 exactly); 3000ms delay in R11 (was 2000ms); clipboard.writeText explicit in R9; ChatPageBody.tsx:92-96 wiring extension covered as 2-file edit (M6 + Hint section)

M7 + R12 + AC6; positioning is explicit: 'immediately above the CONSTRAINTS: block (currently at L98)'; R12 says 'verbatim from Section 5 lines 165-176'; Edge Cases note explicitly forbids paraphrasing the META-RULES block (Reference Source dev constraint, BA spec L75)

M8 + R13 + AC7; BA spec L100 says 'replace L91-92 with verbatim Section 5 lines 183-193'; Reference Source dev constraint (L75) explicitly forbids paraphrasing the harassment-replacement block; AC7 includes the optional runtime trigger ('I think Ken is being harassed by another employee') for live verification of CONCLUSION + no-follow-up behavior

dimension_3_investigation_completeness.evidence: BA spec L43-46 explicitly states 'Search pattern: FeedbackForge / Search scope: full repo /root/feedbackforge (excluding node_modules, .git, docs/dev/) / User reported: app/page.tsx, lib/prompts.ts / Additional found via grep: app/layout.tsx:8 (metadata title), lib/prompts.ts:3 (comment, in addition to L6 prompt body)'. Context JSON L98 confirms 'Full-repo grep for FeedbackForge returns exactly 4 in-app source hits'. Independent QA grep verifies BA's claim is correct: exactly 3 source files (app/page.tsx, lib/prompts.ts, app/layout.tsx) contain 'FeedbackForge', mapping to 4 line-level hits (lib/prompts.ts has 2: L3 and L6). BA also correctly identified that lib/prompts.ts:3 is a code comment IN ADDITION to L6 — not just the system-prompt body. Section 1 of the spec only mentioned app/page.tsx and lib/prompts.ts in the user's directive; BA's sweep extended this to include app/layout.tsx (metadata title) and the L3 comment, which is the correct extension per the user's 'any other place the name appears' clause.

verifications.actual: All 8 files exist and contain the claimed code: app/page.tsx (14, 11-22), app/layout.tsx (8), components/EmployeeCard.tsx (38), components/DraftActions.tsx (30-36), components/ChatPageBody.tsx (92-96), lib/employees.ts (11,21,31,41), lib/use-chat-page-actions.ts (17-20), lib/prompts.ts (3,6,91-92,98). No additional source files contain 'FeedbackForge' or the targeted markup.

verbatim_strings_preserved: Toast text in M6/R10: 'Copied to clipboard! Both the feedback draft and delivery guidance are ready to paste into your notes.' matches spec lines 156-157 byte-for-byte
Tenure strings in M3: all 4 match spec lines 136-139 byte-for-byte (case + punctuation + 'at NormalCompany' suffix)
META-RULES block referenced as 'Section 5 lines 165-176' (verified: spec L165-176 contain the exact 4-bullet block)
Harassment replacement referenced as 'Section 5 lines 183-193' (verified: spec L183-193 contain the exact CONCLUSION block)
implementation_notes_correctly_resolve_s: CHANGE 3: spec says 'In the dashboard card (app/page.tsx)' but tenure markup is in components/EmployeeCard.tsx — BA correctly identifies this and edits EmployeeCard.tsx (BA spec L63)
CHANGE 4: spec says 'In app/feedback/[id]/page.tsx' but Start Over is in components/DraftActions.tsx — BA correctly redirects (BA spec L65)
CHANGE 5: spec implies edit to app/feedback/[id]/page.tsx but actual handler is in lib/use-chat-page-actions.ts; BA correctly identifies the 2-file edit (hook + call site) at L67
edge_cases_appropriately_flagged: Clipboard async rejection (insecure context, denied permission) — silent best-effort acceptable per BA's interpretation
Empty session.messages — already guarded by lastIsDraft() per pre_existing_guards L158

Centering all 3 header children (h1 + 2

tags) including 'Logged in as Alex' — BA flags this as intended per user's 'Center the entire header section'
TypeScript error if useChatPageActions signature extended without updating call site — caught by npm run build
additional_quality_observations.moscow_decomposition_quality: All 8 Must-have items map 1:1 to a CHANGE; Should-have items (S1, S2) appropriately address minor implementation choices; Won't-have items (W1-W7) explicitly fence off scope creep. 14 R-IDs cover all CHANGES with verbatim source-phrase quotes.

self_verification.rationale: Every spot-check was backed by direct Read of the cited file at the cited line range; the FeedbackForge full-repo grep was independently re-run by QA and matches BA's count exactly; spec Section 5 was read in full (lines 116-195) and cross-referenced against M1-M8 + R1-R14 + AC1-AC8 in BA spec; all 7 CHANGES verified covered with no narrowing, renaming, or substitution.
